item.title: EuroPython 2017 days 0 to 3
item.dc:creator: Mariano Anaya
item.description:
A suôÙmôÙmaôÙry of the first daôÙys (from day 0 --ôÙSunôÙday to day 3 --WedôÙnesôÙdaôÙy), of EuôÙroôÙPôÙyôÙthon 2017.

Leer mûÀsãÎ (quedan 4 minutos de lectura)

item.title: Discovering Descriptors
item.dc:creator: Mariano Anaya
item.description:
This taôÙlk was preôÙsenôÙted at PyôÙCon CZ 2017 anôÙd EuôÙroôÙPôÙyôÙthon 2017. HeôÙre are the reôÙfeôÙrenôÙces and reôÙsourôÙces for the preôÙsenôÙtaôÙtioôÙn.

The coôÙde usôÙed for the taôÙlk, is avaiôÙlaôÙble heôÙre anôÙd ôÙconôÙtains soôÙme exôÙplaôÙnaôÙtions along wiôÙth the examôÙpleôÙs.

Leer mûÀsãÎ (quedan 1 minutos de lectura)

item.title: Upcoming talk at PyCon CZ 2017
item.dc:creator: Mariano Anaya
item.description:
The proôÙpoôÙsal of my taôÙlk tiôÙtled "DisôÙcoôÙveôÙring DesôÙcripôÙtors", was acôÙcepôÙted foôÙr ôÙthe next ediôÙtion of PyôÙCon CZ, in PraôÙgue, CzeôÙch ôÙReôÙpuôÙbliôÙc. AlôÙthouôÙgh the scheôÙduôÙle is not yet readôÙy, this taôÙlk wiôÙll most likeôÙly beôÙ on JuôÙne 8th.

The first two daôÙys of the conôÙfeôÙrenôÙce (JuôÙne 8th and JuôÙne 9th), wiôÙll be for taôÙlks, whilst the last one (SôÙaturôÙdaôÙy, JuôÙne 10), wiôÙll be for woôÙrksôÙhops (sôÙprinôÙts).

This is anoôÙther inôÙteôÙresôÙting opporôÙtuôÙniôÙty to shaôÙre and learn from the PyôÙthoôÙn ôÙcoôÙmôÙmuôÙniôÙty, as it was last year when I preôÙsenôÙteôÙd at EuôÙroôÙPôÙyôÙthon 2016. On this ocôÙcaôÙsioôÙn, I ôÙplan to post an enôÙtry wiôÙth the evenôÙts, per eaôÙch day of the conôÙfeôÙrenôÙce.

item.title: Oncoming events of Python and Architecture in September
item.dc:creator: Mariano Anaya
item.description:
El prôÙû°xiôÙmo sûÀôÙbaôÙdo 10 de SepôÙtiemôÙbre, esôÙtaôÙrûˋ preôÙsenôÙtanôÙdo mi charôÙla "Clean coôÙde in PyôÙthoôÙn", de ôÙla û¤lôÙtiôÙma EuôÙroôÙPôÙyôÙthon 2016, en un evenôÙto de PyôÙthon loôÙcal en Cû°rôÙdoôÙba, ArôÙgenôÙtiôÙna [1] [2].

La otra seôÙmaôÙna, esôÙtaôÙrûˋ asisôÙtienôÙdo a un meeôÙtup loôÙcal de arôÙquiôÙrecôÙtuôÙra (arôÙqôÙconôÙf), en donôÙde se preôÙsenôÙtaôÙrûÀ uôÙna charôÙla soôÙbre OpenSôÙtaôÙck [3] y su forôÙma de traôÙbaôÙjo disôÙtriôÙbuûÙôÙda.

EsôÙpeôÙro disôÙfruôÙtar de amôÙbos evenôÙtoôÙs!

[1]https://www.meetup.com/Cordoba-Python-Meetup/events/233741709/
[2]https://medium.com/@toniabdala/juntada-python-c%C3%B3rdoba-septiembre-db4abe5c4858#.yo0x1mqe3
[3]https://www.meetup.com/ArquitecturaDeSoftware/events/233824352/

item.title: My talk @ EuroPython 2016
item.dc:creator: Mariano Anaya
item.description:
I had the great exôÙpeôÙrienôÙce of preôÙsenôÙting at EuôÙroôÙPôÙyôÙthon 2016. My taôÙlk enôÙtiôÙtled "Clean coôÙde in PyôÙthoôÙn", was about good deôÙveôÙloôÙpôÙment pracôÙtiôÙceôÙs, doôÙwn to loôÙw-ôÙleôÙvel deôÙsign (wiôÙth coôÙde examôÙpleôÙs), for PyôÙthoôÙn. The idea of the taôÙlk, was to preôÙsent the "pôÙyôÙthoôÙniôÙc" approôÙach for wriôÙting coôÙde, and how do geôÙneôÙral conôÙcepôÙts of ôÙclean coôÙde apply to PyôÙthoôÙn.

TheôÙse examôÙples miôÙght be useôÙful for beôÙginôÙnerôÙs, deôÙveôÙloôÙpers exôÙpeôÙrienôÙced in other lanôÙguaôÙges coôÙming to PyôÙthoôÙn, and peoôÙple using PyôÙthon for scienôÙtiôÙfic appliôÙcaôÙtionôÙs. The examôÙples could alôÙso be helôÙpful for seôÙnioôÙr ôÙdeôÙveôÙloôÙperôÙs, beôÙcauôÙse they reôÙmind real siôÙtuaôÙtions that miôÙght appear in puôÙll reôÙquesôÙts, whiôÙle doing a coôÙde reôÙview.

HeôÙre is the viôÙdeo on YouôÙTuôÙbe:

And the sliôÙdes (whiôÙch I alôÙso maôÙde avaiôÙlaôÙble along wiôÙth the sourôÙce coôÙde, shorôÙtly after the preôÙsenôÙtaôÙtioôÙn ôÙfiôÙnisôÙhed).

The preôÙsenôÙtaôÙtion was weôÙll reôÙceiôÙveôÙd: soôÙme attenôÙdees ôÙtold me they liked it (eôÙven asked for the sliôÙdes and coôÙde), and I got good adôÙviôÙceôÙs. ôÙThe foôÙlloôÙwing daôÙys of the conôÙfeôÙrenôÙce, moôÙre peoôÙple told me that they liked the preôÙsenôÙtaôÙtioôÙn, and soôÙme otherôÙs ôÙmenôÙtioôÙned (soôÙmeôÙthing I did not thiôÙnk at the beôÙginôÙninôÙg, but that it makes perôÙfect senôÙse), that theôÙse ideaôÙs aôÙre reaôÙlly useôÙful for peoôÙple using PyôÙthon in scienôÙtiôÙfic enôÙviôÙronôÙmenôÙts.

I am glad it was useôÙful for the coôÙmôÙmuôÙniôÙty.

item.title: Upcoming talk at EuroPython 2016
item.dc:creator: Mariano Anaya
item.description:
I am glad to inôÙform that I wiôÙll be speaking at EuôÙroôÙPôÙyôÙthon 2016 conôÙfeôÙrenôÙce.

I'ôÙll speak @euôÙroôÙpôÙyôÙthon 2016:
'Clean coôÙde in PyôÙthoôÙn' httpôÙs://ôÙt.ôÙcoôÙ/e4ôÙclWU3aDM

ã MaôÙriano (@rôÙmaôÙriaôÙnoa) March 27, 2016

My suôÙbmisôÙsion about clean coôÙde in PyôÙthon was acôÙcepôÙteôÙd, so in the next ediôÙtion of EuôÙroôÙPôÙyôÙthon 2016, in BilôÙbao, SpaiôÙn, I wiôÙll taôÙlk about clean coôÙde prinôÙciôÙples for PyôÙthoôÙn. HeôÙre is the absôÙtracôÙt:

https://ep2016.europython.eu/conference/talks/clean-code-in-python

The fuôÙll list of taôÙlks is avaiôÙlaôÙble at:

https://ep2016.europython.eu/en/events/sessions/

If you are inôÙteôÙresôÙteôÙd, subsôÙcriôÙbe to the EuôÙroôÙPôÙyôÙthon blog and YouôÙtuôÙbe chanôÙneôÙl. I wiôÙll inôÙcluôÙde moôÙre deôÙtailôÙs in a seôÙpaôÙraôÙte posôÙt.
